hints.description: This company operates a global cruise line, offering vacations across various destinations. They own and operate several brands including Oceania Cruises and Regent Seven Seas Cruises, providing a range of experiences from luxury voyages to family-friendly adventures. Gavin ***** is the current CEO, and the company faced significant challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic due to travel restrictions.
hints.funFact1: The company was originally founded in 1966 as Norwegian Caribbean Lines, focusing initially on ferry services between Norway and the Caribbean before transitioning to cruises.
hints.funFact2: In 2016, the company acquired Prestige Cruises International, the parent company of Oceania Cruises and Regent Seven Seas Cruises, significantly expanding its fleet and market reach to become the third-largest cruise operator globally, trading under the symbol ****.
